Museum Foyer.name: Museum Foyer
Museum Foyer.description: A grand, echoing hall with marble floors and vaulted ceilings. A massive, heavy banner for the new 'Ancient Rome' exhibit hangs precariously over the main walkway. The ticket desk sits empty.
Museum Foyer.first_entry_text: The museum is eerily quiet. The heavy marble echoes your every footstep. History is dead, but it feels like something here is very much alive.

furniture.name: Ticket Desk
furniture.description: A polished wooden desk with a powered-off register.

objects.name: Exhibition Banner
objects.description: A multi-ton brass and canvas banner hanging from the ceiling. One of the mounting brackets looks severely bent.

objects.name: Leaking Skylight
objects.description: A small crack in the glass dome above is letting in rain, forming a puddle on the smooth marble.

Dinosaur Hall.name: Dinosaur Hall
Dinosaur Hall.description: towering T-Rex skeleton dominates the center of the room. The floorboards here are old and creak loudly. To the west is the Archives staircase.

hazards_present.name: T-Rex Skull
hazards_present.description: The massive fossilized skull is suspended by steel cables, but it looks unbalanced and leans heavily to one side.

objects.name: Warped Floorboard
objects.description: The antique hardwood floor sags dangerously near the center exhibit.

Restoration Lab.name: Restoration Lab
Restoration Lab.description: A sterile, brightly lit room where artifacts are cleaned. The air smells sharply of chemicals. There is a large sink and rows of heavy metal shelving.

furniture.name: Supply Shelf
furniture.description: A tall metal shelf overloaded with plaster and stone busts. It leans dangerously away from the wall.

objects.name: Solvent Drum
objects.description: A 55-gallon drum of industrial solvent used for stripping lacquer. A steady drip from a rusted seam is forming a puddle.

Basement Archives Stairs.name: Basement Archives Stairs
Basement Archives Stairs.description: A narrow, dark wooden staircase descending into the museum's basement storage. It smells of rot and mildew.

objects.name: Rickety Staircase
objects.description: The wooden stairs are deeply rotted. Several treads are cracked, and the whole structure groans.

objects.name: Exposed Wall Wiring
objects.description: An old junction box is missing its cover. The wires inside frequently arc with blue sparks.
